title: Blackboard Patterns
description: Schema for the blackboard patterns file that accumulates learned behavioral and structural patterns

codebase_insights.description: Observations about the structure, conventions, and characteristics of the codebase

execution_patterns.description: Recurring patterns observed in how tasks are executed (e.g. common wave shapes, frequent agent combos)

user_behavior.description: Inferred patterns about user preferences and interaction style

recurring_issues.description: Issues or failure modes that have appeared more than once across sessions
